name: saliency_focus_map
description: Creates a generic visual focus artifact by highlighting likely object regions and their centers using image-derived saliency and connected components, supporting later relative-position reasoning between two mentioned objects.
applicability_conditions: Use for relative-position questions in natural or illustrated scenes when the solver needs a reusable focus artifact before deciding left/right or above/below between two referenced objects. Appropriate when no object-specific detector is available, including raw images or intermediate image artifacts, and especially for the recurring family pattern of binary spatial comparisons between two visible objects.
